title: v2 browser continuation assertion exchange request
description: Request body for POST /auth/contenttree/exchange (see openapi/plugin-api.yaml and docs/security.md). The browser, having been redirected to the plugin's launch_url with the assertion attached, submits it here so the plugin's own origin can verify it and mint a first-party session before rendering the interactive continuation.

assertion.description: The RS256-signed browser continuation interaction-assertion JWT (compact serialization), whose claims are described by interaction-assertion-claims.schema.json.
